metadata.description: Evidence-based visual & interface design — ten skills: composition-and-design-theory (the arrangement/composition specialist), colour, charting, UX/layout, typography, branding, imagery (select/critique/direct photos & illustration), plus house-style-templates (design-craft's house look), developing-style (an evidence-based method to build your own style), and brand-absorption (capture an existing brand for a facelift/reskin). Depends on Anthropic's frontend-design plugin.

plugins.name: design-craft
plugins.description: Ten skills: composition-and-design-theory (the arrangement/composition specialist), graphical-perception-and-color, charting (Tufte), interface-ux-and-layout, typography, branding, imagery — proven vs convention vs myth, with worked galleries — plus house-style-templates (five directional house-look templates), developing-style (a method to build your own style/identity), and brand-absorption (absorb an existing brand for a facelift).
